summary: Frontend testing for Maksuerätaulukko (payment schedule table) feature. 14/16 tests passed. Found 2 critical bugs.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Last row percentage (10%) doesn't match amount (20,000€). The last row shows 10% but amount is 20,000€ which is 20% of 100,000€. Total percentage shows 90% instead of 100% while total amount is correct at 100,000€. The code adjusts last row amount for rounding but doesn't update the percentage display.

integration_issues.issue: Copy button shows 'Kopiointi epäonnistui' (Copy failed) in headless browser. May work in real browser with proper clipboard permissions.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix YSE-6 last row percentage calculation. When amount is adjusted for rounding, the percentage should also be recalculated to match: newPercent = (amount / baseAmount) * 100
MINOR: Consider adding error handling for clipboard copy failures with fallback behavior
critical_code_review_comments: BUG in calculateRows() at line 142-156: When last row amount is adjusted with remainder (baseAmount - runningTotal), the percentage is not updated. Row shows 10% but amount is 20,000€ (20%)
YSE-6 preset percentages (10,15,20,20,15,10) sum to 90%, not 100%. Either fix the preset or handle the remainder properly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Maksuerätaulukko feature mostly working. Critical bug: YSE-6 preset last row shows incorrect percentage. Total % = 90% but total amount = 100,000€ is correct. 10-80-10 and YSE-8 presets work correctly with 100% total.

tests_executed.details: Button [data-testid='maksuerataulukko-button'] opens dedicated page with back button, input fields
ALV 0% and Sis. ALV 25,5% radio buttons visible and selectable
Select [data-testid='maksuerataulukko-preset'] shows YSE-6, YSE-8, 10-80-10, Custom options
Last row shows 10% = 20,000€ (should be 10% = 10,000€). Total % = 90% instead of 100%
Row 1: white, Row 2: rgb(245,247,250) - alternating correctly
Muokattava tab has 18 editable inputs for customizing rows
Button clicked but shows 'Kopiointi epäonnistui' - clipboard permission issue in headless browser
Selecting 10-80-10 shows milestone count dropdown [data-testid='maksuerataulukko-milestones'] with 4,5,6 options. Generates 8 rows with 100% total
YSE-8 generates 8 rows with correct percentages summing to 100%

rca_of_issue.root_cause: In calculateRows() function (line 144-156), the last row amount is calculated as baseAmount - runningTotal to handle rounding, but the percentage is not updated. For YSE-6, first 5 rows: 10000+15000+20000+20000+15000 = 80000. Last row gets 100000-80000 = 20000 (20%) but displays original 10% from preset.
rca_of_issue.suggested_fix: After calculating last row amount, also update the percentage: if (index === rows.length - 1) { amount = baseAmount - runningTotal; percent = (amount / baseAmount) * 100; }
